title: fel's stuff
description: A mod that aims to add new materials and equipment to the game while keeping the vanilla balance
body:
Fel's stuff is a mod that adds stuff I came up with and decided to implement into the game.
Mod includes mainly new materials tools, armors and ingridients.
I tried to make almost every armor and tools do something special so it isn't boring to use the new equipment.

Mod is activley being updated :D
(made using MCreator)



main features:

- scarlite ore (spawns beneath the dark forest)
- Frost ore (spawns in snowy and frozen biomes)
- Viralium ore (spawns beneath jungle biomes)
- Jade ore (spawns in lush caves)
- petrified iron ore (spawns in dripstone caves)
- Dritanium ore (spawns in diorite)
- carbonfiber (craftable)
- shadow diamond (craftable)
- (check out the gallery to see more)
